hero.title: Preparing Talent for International Opportunity
hero.subtitle: Beyond domestic employability, Futureminds prepares students and professionals for global standards of communication and workplace readiness — through structured, assessment-aligned programmes.

positioning: Positioned as global career readiness and professional preparation — not a visa or migration service.

features.title: CEFR Training
features.text: Common European Framework of Reference alignment for measurable language proficiency.

features.title: OET Support
features.text: Occupational English Test preparation for healthcare and professional contexts.

features.title: International Communication
features.text: Cross-cultural workplace fluency and professional communication standards.

features.title: Global Employability
features.text: Career readiness and professional preparation for an international workforce.

outcomes: Readiness aligned to global assessment standards
